markets.question: Missouri State Bears vs. Liberty Flames
markets.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for March 11 at 6:30 PM ET:

If the Missouri State Bears win, the market will resolve to "Missouri State Bears".

If the Liberty Flames win, the market will resolve to "Liberty Flames".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
